schemaOwnedExceptions.extraFields.UserProfileDoc.profilePhotos: Transitional Admin SDK facade field. JSON Schema owns the persisted shape; this facade keeps live FirebaseFirestore.Timestamp types for Functions code until the Admin SDK facade is generated from contracts.
schemaOwnedExceptions.extraFields.PublicProfileDoc.languages: Transitional Admin SDK facade field. JSON Schema owns public profile fields; the Dart-derived public model still needs this overlay until the old generator is retired.
schemaOwnedExceptions.extraFields.PublicProfileDoc.profilePhot: Transitional Admin SDK facade field. JSON Schema owns the persisted shape; this facade keeps live FirebaseFirestore.Timestamp types for Functions code until the Admin SDK facade is generated from contracts.
schemaOwnedExceptions.fieldOverrides.UserProfileDoc.profilePho: Override the Dart-derived nullable type so Functions use the non-null profilePhotos array shape owned by JSON Schema when the field exists.
schemaOwnedExceptions.fieldOverrides.PublicProfileDoc.language: Overlay the public-profile language field while the transitional facade is still Dart-derived.
schemaOwnedExceptions.fieldOverrides.PublicProfileDoc.profileP: Override the Dart-derived nullable type so Functions use the non-null profilePhotos array shape owned by JSON Schema when the field exists.
schemaOwnedExceptions.extraFields.EventDoc.eventPolicy: Transitional Admin SDK facade field. JSON Schema owns events.eventPolicy, while Functions need the hand-written EventPolicyBundleDoc shape until nested schema-derived TypeScript types are generated.
schemaOwnedExceptions.fieldOverrides.EventDoc.eventPolicy: Override the Dart-derived loose map type so Functions use the explicit EventPolicyBundleDoc snapshot owned by the events JSON Schema.
schemaOwnedExceptions.extraInterfaces.ProfilePromptAnswer: Duplicated only for the transitional Admin SDK facade; the canonical embedded schema remains contracts/embedded/profile_prompt_answer.schema.json.
schemaOwnedExceptions.extraInterfaces.PhotoPromptAnswer: Duplicated only for the transitional Admin SDK facade; the canonical embedded schema remains contracts/embedded/photo_prompt_answer.schema.json.
schemaOwnedExceptions.extraInterfaces.ProfilePhoto: Duplicated only for the transitional Admin SDK facade because generated schema types model serialized fixture timestamps, while Functions need FirebaseFirestore.Timestamp.

UserProfileDoc.name: fcmToken
UserProfileDoc.comment: Runtime — written by FcmService, not part of the profile form

UserProfileDoc.name: deleted
UserProfileDoc.comment: Safety/account lifecycle field written by account deletion flow

UserProfileDoc.name: profilePhotos
UserProfileDoc.comment: Migration field; legacy documents may still only have parallel photo arrays

MatchDoc.name: participantIds
MatchDoc.comment: Always [user1Id, user2Id], used for Firestore arrayContains queries

PublicProfileDoc.name: profilePhotos
PublicProfileDoc.comment: Migration field; legacy projections may still only have parallel photo arrays

EventDoc.name: eventPolicy
EventDoc.comment: Production event-policy snapshot; legacy events may fall back to capacityLimit, priceInPaise, and constraints

extraInterfaces.name: ClubHostProfile
extraInterfaces.comment: Stored inside clubs/{clubId}.hostProfiles for public multi-host display.

extraInterfaces.name: ProfilePromptAnswer
extraInterfaces.comment: Stored inside users/{uid}.profilePrompts and publicProfiles/{uid}.profilePrompts.

extraInterfaces.name: PhotoPromptAnswer
extraInterfaces.comment: Stored inside users/{uid}.photoPrompts and publicProfiles/{uid}.photoPrompts.

extraInterfaces.name: EventFormatSnapshot
extraInterfaces.comment: Stored inside events/{eventId}.eventFormat so event success, health activity, and host defaults share one activity taxonomy.

extraInterfaces.name: ClubHostDefaults
extraInterfaces.comment: Stored inside clubs/{clubId}.hostDefaults and copied into new event drafts.

extraInterfaces.name: EventPolicyDefaults
extraInterfaces.comment: Stored inside clubs/{clubId}.hostDefaults.eventPolicy.

extraInterfaces.name: EventSuccessDefaults
extraInterfaces.comment: Stored inside clubs/{clubId}.hostDefaults.eventSuccess.

extraInterfaces.name: ProfilePhotoModeration
extraInterfaces.comment: Stored inside users/{uid}.profilePhotos and publicProfiles/{uid}.profilePhotos.

extraInterfaces.name: ProfilePhoto
extraInterfaces.comment: Canonical grouped profile photo object replacing parallel URL/prompt arrays.

extraInterfaces.name: EventPolicyBundleDoc
extraInterfaces.comment: Stored inside events/{eventId}.eventPolicy for production booking, pricing, cancellation, and settlement behavior.

extraInterfaces.name: EventPolicyAdmissionDoc
extraInterfaces.comment: Nested inside events/{eventId}.eventPolicy.admission.

extraInterfaces.name: EventPolicyPrivateAccessDoc
extraInterfaces.comment: Public, non-secret invite metadata nested inside events/{eventId}.eventPolicy.admission.privateAccessPolicy. Secret invite codes live in eventPrivateAccess/{eventId}.

extraInterfaces.name: EventPolicyWaitlistDoc
extraInterfaces.comment: Nested inside events/{eventId}.eventPolicy.admission.waitlistPolicy.

extraInterfaces.name: EventPolicyBalancedRatioDoc
extraInterfaces.comment: Nested inside events/{eventId}.eventPolicy.admission.balancedRatioPolicy.

extraInterfaces.name: EventPolicyPricingDoc
extraInterfaces.comment: Nested inside events/{eventId}.eventPolicy.pricing.

extraInterfaces.name: EventPolicyDemandPricingRuleDoc
extraInterfaces.collectionPath: embedded event policy demand pricing rule
extraInterfaces.comment: Nested inside events/{eventId}.eventPolicy.pricing.demandPricingRules.

extraInterfaces.name: EventPrivateAccessDoc
extraInterfaces.comment: Host-private invite material created by createEvent for invite-only events.

extraInterfaces.name: BlockDoc
extraInterfaces.comment: Server-enforced safety edge. Either direction blocks shared dating surfaces.

extraInterfaces.name: ReportDoc
extraInterfaces.comment: Server-owned safety report for abuse/moderation review.

extraInterfaces.name: ModerationFlagDoc
extraInterfaces.comment: Server-owned moderation ticket created when auto-moderation flags content.

interfaceComments.PublicProfileDoc: Written exclusively by syncPublicProfile Cloud Function.
interfaceComments.MatchDoc: Written exclusively by onSwipeCreated Cloud Function.
interfaceComments.ReviewDoc: Written by review Cloud Functions using one deterministic document per (eventId, reviewerUserId) pair.

EventDoc.priceInPaise: legacy field name; amount in the event currency's minor unit. 0 = free event
EventDoc.genderCounts: Keys are Gender enum names: 'man', 'woman', 'nonBinary', 'other'. Denormalized counts maintained atomically by Cloud Functions.

PaymentDoc.amount: amount in the payment currency's minor unit
PaymentDoc.signUpFailed: True when payment succeeded but sign-up failed due to a race or refund
PaymentDoc.id: Razorpay paymentId for paid, auto-id for free

ReviewDoc.eventId: Required for new callable-created reviews; nullable only for legacy review documents until migration.
